'''âl-h-ch''' ('''kalahach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbrue|imbrue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbrue|imbrue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-h-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kalahach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilahach|thilahach]] || [[word:jilahach|jilahach]] || [[word:shilahach|shilahach]] || [[word:kilahach|kilahach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulahach|thuthulahach]] || [[word:jujulahach|jujulahach]] || [[word:shushulahach|shushulahach]] || [[word:kukulahach|kukulahach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulahach|thulahach]] || [[word:julahach|julahach]] || [[word:shulahach|shulahach]] || [[word:kulahach|kulahach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulahach|thulahach]] || [[word:julahach|julahach]] || [[word:shulahach|shulahach]] || [[word:kulahach|kulahach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelahach|thelahach]] || [[word:jelahach|jelahach]] || [[word:shelahach|shelahach]] || [[word:kelahach|kelahach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholahach|thotholahach]] || [[word:jojolahach|jojolahach]] || [[word:shosholahach|shosholahach]] || [[word:kokolahach|kokolahach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholahach|tholahach]] || [[word:jolahach|jolahach]] || [[word:sholahach|sholahach]] || [[word:kolahach|kolahach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholahach|tholahach]] || [[word:jolahach|jolahach]] || [[word:sholahach|sholahach]] || [[word:kolahach|kolahach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlahach|thĂŠlahach]] || [[word:jĂŠlahach|jĂŠlahach]] || [[word:shĂŠlahach|shĂŠlahach]] || [[word:kĂŠlahach|kĂŠlahach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalahach|thathalahach]] || [[word:jajalahach|jajalahach]] || [[word:shashalahach|shashalahach]] || [[word:kakalahach|kakalahach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalahach|thalahach]] || [[word:jalahach|jalahach]] || [[word:shalahach|shalahach]] || [[word:kalahach|kalahach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalahach|thalahach]] || [[word:jalahach|jalahach]] || [[word:shalahach|shalahach]] || [[word:kalahach|kalahach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalahach|shalahach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalahach|goshalahach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalahach|gokishalahach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalahachnĂŒ|shalahachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalahachnknĂŒ|goshalahachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalahachnĂŒ|gokishalahachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalahachshĂ«|shalahachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalahachnkshĂ«|goshalahachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalahachshĂ«|gokishalahachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalahachro|shalahachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalahachnkro|goshalahachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalahachro|gokishalahachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalahachmu|shalahachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalahachnkmu|goshalahachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalahachmu|gokishalahachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalahachsher|shalahachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalahachnksher|goshalahachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalahachsher|gokishalahachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalahachng|shalahachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalahachnkng|goshalahachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalahachng|gokishalahachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalahachya|shalahachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalahachnkya|goshalahachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalahachya|gokishalahachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalahachyam|shalahachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalahachnkyam|goshalahachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalahachyam|gokishalahachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalahachnĂŒshĂ«|shalahachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalahachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalahachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalahachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalahachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalahachnĂŒro|shalahachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalahachnknĂŒro|goshalahachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalahachnĂŒro|gokishalahachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalahachnĂŒmu|shalahachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalahachnknĂŒmu|goshalahachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalahachnĂŒmu|gokishalahachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalahachshĂ«nĂŒ|shalahachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalahachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalahachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalahachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalahachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalahachshĂ«ro|shalahachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalahachnkshĂ«ro|goshalahachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalahachshĂ«ro|gokishalahachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalahachshĂ«mu|shalahachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalahachnkshĂ«mu|goshalahachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalahachshĂ«mu|gokishalahachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalahachronĂŒ|shalahachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalahachnkronĂŒ|goshalahachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalahachronĂŒ|gokishalahachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalahachroshĂ«|shalahachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalahachnkroshĂ«|goshalahachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalahachroshĂ«|gokishalahachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalahachromu|shalahachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalahachnkromu|goshalahachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalahachromu|gokishalahachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalahachmunĂŒ|shalahachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalahachnkmunĂŒ|goshalahachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalahachmunĂŒ|gokishalahachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalahachmushĂ«|shalahachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalahachnkmushĂ«|goshalahachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalahachmushĂ«|gokishalahachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalahachmuro|shalahachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalahachnkmuro|goshalahachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalahachmuro|gokishalahachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
